name: Chicken Deli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup low calorie Russian salad dressing
6 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half the sauerkraut in a 3 1/2 quart electric slow cooker.
2. Drizzle about 1/3 cup of the dressing over the sauerkraut.
3. Arrange 3 chicken breast halves on top of the sauerkraut.
4. Spread the mustard evenly over the chicken breasts.
5. Cover with the remaining sauerkraut and chicken breasts.
6. Drizzle another 1/3 cup dressing over the casserole.
7. Refrigerate the remaining dressing until serving time.
8. Cook on low heat setting for about 3 1/2 to 4 hours, or until the chicken is white throughout and tender.
9. To serve, spoon the casserole onto plates (4 or 5).
10. Sprinkle shredded Swiss cheese over the top (3 to 4 tablespoons).
11. Drizzle a small amount of Russian dressing on each plate.
12. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
